name: add_postgresql_indexing
avoid: do not add indexes on low-cardinality columns
brief_template:
To add PostgreSQL indexing:
1. Identify slow queries from logs or pg_stat_statements
2. Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on target queries
3. Add B-tree index for equality/range: CREATE INDEX idx ON table(column)
4. Add GIN index for JSONB/array/fts
5. Add partial index WHERE clause for filtered queries
6. Re-run EXPLAIN to verify improvement
7. Monitor index bloat with pgstattuple
